<!--
  This checklist IS the Definition of Done (see AGENTS.md §3).
  It is not decoration: only request a review with ALL applicable items checked.
-->

## What changes

<!-- Short description and the WHY. Link to the issue/goal. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore / build / ci

## Definition of Done

- [ ] The code **compiles** (`./gradlew assembleDebug`)
- [ ] The **tests pass** (`./gradlew test`) and there is a test for the relevant new logic
- [ ] The **lint passes** (`./gradlew ktlintCheck`)
- [ ] The **UI works** correctly (tested at runtime/preview)
- [ ] The affected **documentation** in `docs/` was updated
- [ ] **Prompts** recorded in `prompts/` and AI usage in `docs/14_ai_usage_log.md`
- [ ] **Architecture preserved** (data/domain/ui layers, MVVM, no duplicated logic)
- [ ] Non-trivial decisions recorded (ADR in `docs/adr/` or commit body)

## AI usage in this PR

- Tool(s): <Claude Code | Antigravity | Codex | Copilot | none>
- What was generated by AI and what was written/reviewed manually:
- What the AI proposed and you **rejected** (and why):

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Points of attention, questions, open decisions. -->
